//: Demo content + difficulty definitions for the Steam Next Fest build. Read by the desktop shell to drive area progression, puzzle list, and per-puzzle difficulty overrides. Placeholder images use the existing daily-puzzle dates from production; once themed artwork is ready, swap puzzleDate for the new dates (or change the resolver to read from a different path entirely).
//curve: Four-tier difficulty: Classroom -> School -> Outside -> Online (production daily). Each demo tier is ~1.5x the previous in piece count; the online daily is the implicit fourth tier (~100% of production) that demo owners graduate into via the lighthouse landmark on the world map. Sizes here are 25% / 50% / 75% of production hard, leaving the daily as the real challenge.
//status: Classroom diamond locked at 4000c/16p after timing (8:59 actual). Other classroom sizes locked from user-pace timing. School + Outside values are predicted from the 1.5x curve and PENDING TIMING verification with the eventual specialist artwork; expect to tweak after the next two rounds of timing data.
//curated: To use bespoke themed artwork instead of a daily puzzle, author a folder under curated/<id>/ (id = a reserved ISO date before 2026-03-17), run `node scripts/build-curated.mjs`, then set that area's puzzleDate to the id. See curated/README.md. Daily dates below are kept for now so the demo-harness timing run keeps working until artwork lands.
